message:
feat(daemon): add host metrics collector reading from /proc

Adds HostMetricsCollector that reads CPU, memory, network, and disk
metrics directly from /proc/stat, /proc/meminfo, /proc/net/dev, and
/proc/diskstats. This enables the dashboard to display host-level
resource utilization alongside per-VM metrics.

- Returns error for critical metrics (CPU, memory) failures
- Logs warnings for ParseInt failures instead of silently ignoring
- Network and disk I/O are optional (errors logged but not returned)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
